summary: FR-SHARE-001 (JSON Export & Import) implementation on feature/17-json-export-import reviewed and APPROVED. All 7 test IDs verified (T-FE-SHARE-001-01 through T-FE-SHARE-001-04, T-E2E-AFOL-001-01, T-E2E-ERR-001-01, T-SEC-SEC-001-01). No blocking issues found. exportService.ts, ActionBar.tsx, Notification.tsx, and useBrickStore.ts all pass review. Security (NFR-SEC-002 allowlist sanitization), accessibility (NFR-A11Y-001), and error isolation (CLR-05) all verified. PR #55 is ready for human approval and merge. Review comment posted at https://github.com/sreenivasmrpivot/legobuilder-challenger-config1/pull/55#issuecomment-4253209217
